note: Courses deemed by the Faculty as equivalent can be substituted as appropriate.

equivalences.conditions: CEM1009H + CEM1010H is equivalent to CEM1000W
CSC1010H is equivalent to either CSC1015F or CSC1015S
MAM1004F/S passed at 65% is equivalent to MAM1031F
MAM1000W is no longer offered. It was split into MAM1031F (S1) and MAM1032S (S2). Both together are equivalent to the former MAM1000W.
MAM2000W is the combined full-year packaging of the four second-year pure mathematics semester courses.
MAM2046W is the combined full-year packaging of the four second-year applied mathematics semester courses.
MAM3000W is the combined full-year packaging of third-year pure mathematics semester courses (any four, including at least one of MAM3010F/S and MAM3011F/S).
MAM3040W is the combined full-year packaging of third-year applied mathematics semester courses (any four of the five).
EEE2049W is the combined full-year packaging of EEE2041F and EEE2042S.
